title: U.S. Navy has not yet escorted ships through Strait of Hormuz, White House says
label: Soft paywall

comments.body: Crude oil was at $80 very briefly after his tweet, only to rise quickly again once it was proven false..

replies.body:
The price probably rose due to reports of mines being laid.

https://www.cnn.com/2026/03/10/politics/iran-begins-laying-mines-in-strait-of-hormuz

comments.body: Gonna have to if they [keep laying mines](https://www.cnn.com/2026/03/10/politics/iran-begins-laying-mines-in-strait-of-hormuz)

replies.body: Their strategy is probably for Trump to not make it to the end of his term
Pretty sure an escort will not get you around mines.

comments.body: Well, two oil tankers went through the Strait today. So, things are fine. I’m sure they carried enough for everyone.

replies.body: Those appear to be proxy flagged ships for China.
Chinese ships. Iran allows them passage.

comments.body: Losing a Minesweeper or Destroyer escorting an oil tanker would be a very on-brand thing for the Trump admin.
If trump loses a naval ship he's fucked

replies.body:
No he’s not, his cult will do Olympic level gymnastics to justify it and they would tell you how that’s actually a good thing all those seamen died, or they knew they were going to get blown up, when they signed up, so it actually doesn’t matter. 

If he told them to break a Mason jar in their ass, they would all do it while telling you why it’s actually a good thing to pull glass shards out of your bleeding rectum.
Why would that be any different than the myriad other awful things he’s done since 2015 lol.

comments.body: How can they lay mines if trump says they wiped out their entire navy?

replies.body:
People who believe Trump have no concept of how big the world is and lack spatial awareness.  

They see a map and they fail to understand scale.  The Strait of Hormuz is 21 miles at the narrow.  That is the distance from The White House to almost Annapolis. 

That is roughly 105 aircraft carriers end to end.   At 60 miles per hour that is 21 minutes drive.   Now assume they mine all around the straight and beyond.  That is 1200 Square miles or so.  

Now find those pins

Because 

A) They most likely didn’t wipe out the entire Navy of Iran and only wiped out there actual battleships capable of fighting an American ship.

and

B) It’s not exactly rocket science to get a few sailors to hop into a motor boat with a mine and drop it in the ocean.

comments.body: Didn’t the US retire the mine sweepers in the region 2 weeks before the war started?
I thought the underwriters had placed a moratorium on insuring Hormuz tanker loads.
